runs.text: Thank you so much for leaving a review! We loved reading your feedback and are thrilled you are enjoying your hydration drops.
As a thank-you, we added 500 bonus points to your account. Combined with your existing balance, you now have 750 points ready to redeem.

runs.text: You can use them now to get 15% off your next order — just apply your points at checkout.

runs.text: Thanks for being part of the ride. We couldn't do it without you. ❤️ Buoy

runs.text: P.S. Roses are red, Water is clear, Stay hydrated, And spread good cheer.
